title: Discovery & Research
description: In-depth analysis of requirements, market research, and user needs to establish project foundation and goals.

title: Strategy & Planning
description: Development of comprehensive strategy, roadmap creation, and resource allocation for project execution.

title: Design & Prototyping
description: Creation of wireframes, mockups, and interactive prototypes to visualize the solution and gather feedback.

title: Development
description: Agile development process with continuous integration, testing, and deployment of features.

title: Testing & QA
description: Comprehensive testing including unit tests, integration tests, and user acceptance testing to ensure quality.

title: Deployment & Launch
description: Preparation for launch, deployment to production, and monitoring for issues and user feedback.
